## Feature Request

### Summary

Describe the proposed rule, preset change, API addition, or release improvement.

### Motivation

Explain the gap in the current plugin or maintenance workflow.

### Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected rule behavior, preset shape, or release/documentation workflow.

### Alternatives Considered

List any existing rules, plugin options, or release-process alternatives you evaluated.

### Additional Context

Include code examples, prior art, or related issues.
